warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg to read), the lower-numbered sheet (11/19) paired with sheet 12/19 extracted as _2.json.

This is a section-summary/index sheet listing the 3 sub-categories (3.1-3.3) of หมวดงานระบบสุขาภิบาล with no quantities; 3.1 begins its detailed itemization on this same page image (sheet 12/19). The total-row label reads 'รวมงาน 3' (not 'รวมข้อ 3' as used for section 2's total rows) - transcribed exactly as printed.
Printed page number (doc_page) not legibly visible at the scan corners - left null rather than guessed.

doc_page (41) was not directly legible on this sheet's own corner crop, but is inferred with high confidence from a confirmed linear relationship: page 38's cover sheet had a clearly legible doc_page=36 and page 47's final sheet had a clearly legible doc_page=45 (both full 2-digit numbers, independently re-verified via zoomed crops) - a consistent offset of png_page - 2 across all 10 pages in this 38-47 batch.

Independent re-read (t4, 2026-07-08 schema round) matches t3's transcription exactly, all 3 sub-category labels and the 'รวมงาน 3' total-row label wording confirmed. No disagreement found. Only wrapper-level addition vs t3 is the new mandatory source_image field.
